creator: dev@george-net.de
text:
Just did a fresh install on a 9.3 amd64 machine:

# /usr/local/etc/rc.d/bacula-sd start
Starting bacula_sd.
Shared object "libiconv.so.2" not found, required by "libintl.so.8"
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/bacula-sd: WARNING: failed to start bacula_sd

# pkg install libiconv

fixes this.

I guess there is dependency info missing for the port.
